original_text:
### Email Canvas & Grid **[GENERAL — not specified in guide; Solstice email baseline]**
- Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
- Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
- Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).
- **Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.
- **Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
  - Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
  - Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
- Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.

**Section side padding: 24px** left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless). Full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run to 600px, but text within them still respects 24px insets.

rules.intent: Maintain email horizontal alignment and responsive behavior across assembled sections.
rules.rule_text: The email canvas width must be fixed at 600px centered (dimension.canvas.width = 600px), using a mobile breakpoint of 480px (breakpoint.grid.mobile = 480px) to collapse columns. All sections must respect a 24px left/right side padding (padding.section.side = 24px) for aligned text layouts.

quotes: Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
**Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.** All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Maintain vertical typographic alignment and clean stacking behavior during email assembly.
rules.rule_text: Email layout elements must follow an 8px base spacing unit (spacing.grid.base_unit = 8px). Each stacked section owns its own 32px top and bottom internal padding (padding.section.vertical = 32px) with zero external margins between sections. Set exact inner element gaps: 16px heading-to-body (margin.flow.heading_to_body = 16px), 16px paragraph-to-paragraph, 24px body-to-CTA/callout (margin.flow.body_to_cta = 24px), and 8px image-to-caption (margin.flow.image_to_caption = 8px).

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics. One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Maintain high contrast and accessible sizing for primary and secondary actions across all sections.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTAs must use Brand Blue (#00529b) background with White (#ffffff) text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding of 14px 32px, and a 24px corner radius. Secondary CTAs must use a white background with a 2px Brand Blue border (border.cta.secondary = 2px) and Brand Blue text. All buttons must have a minimum touch target height of 48px (dimension.accessibility.touch_target_min = 48px). At most one primary CTA is allowed per section.
